name: Crafty Car Adapter
summary: The Crafty Car Adapter allows you to charge your Crafty vaporiser while on the go, making it convenient and easy.
description: The Crafty Car Adapter allows you to charge your Crafty vaporiser while on the go, making it convenient and easy.
